api_key.description: Wasabi Stats API credential. If this value contains exactly one ':' separator (a 'username:password'-shaped value), it is sent as HTTP Basic auth with the two split parts; otherwise it is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <api_key>'. This runtime content-based branch is implemented in hooks/wasabi-stats-api/hooks.go (AuthHook), matching legacy's requester() exactly. Never logged.

base_url.description: Wasabi Stats API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Lower bound sent verbatim as legacy's 'start_date' query parameter on Check and stream reads. Not a true incremental cursor: this connector sends it as a fixed filter on every request, never advancing it from persisted state.
